title: magnolia × soulangeana var. lennei
intro: Magnolia × soulangeana var. lennei, also known as Lenne's Magnolia or Saucer Magnolia, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a hybrid of the Magnolia denudata and Magnolia liliiflora species, characterized by its large, showy flowers and broad, obovate leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Magnolia × soulangeana var. lennei include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
